channel.title: DTO
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The scary numbers on retirement healthcare: You’ll need up to $469,000 saved
Republican Representative Gonzales to end re-election bid after sex allegations
item.description: U.S. Representative Tony Gonzales will not seek re-election, following allegations that he had an affair with a former staff member who later died by ...

item.title: Robinhood’s $695 Platinum card vs. $895 Amex Platinum: Which has better perks?
Justice Department publishes missing Epstein files involving uncorroborated claim about Trump
item.description: The Justice Department on Thursday released additional Jeffrey Epstein files involving uncorroborated accusations made by a woman against President Do...

item.title: CEO: Anthropic has ‘no choice’ but to fight Pentagon’s ‘supply-chain risk’ tag
How Iran and Venezuela strikes transform the Trump-Xi trade talks
item.description: The Iran war and the U.S. attack in Venezuela show a Trump administration more willing to eschew diplomacy and take military action.

item.title: How the Iran conflict is spreading — in pictures
item.description: Images published Thursday showed destruction across Tehran after nearly a week of strikes on Iran's capital.

item.title: Oil surges after Qatar energy minister warns prices could hit $150 a barrel
Trump taps Sen. Markwayne Mullin after firing Kristi Noem as DHS secretary
item.description: Noem's chief advisor, Corey Lewandowski, will also leave his position at DHS, MS Now reported.

item.title: Why the U.S.’s ‘newfound oil’ in Venezuela won’t offset an Iran oil shock
